text: {"procedure_id":"scholarship_application","stages":[{"ordinal":0,"label":"Eligibility & Profile Confirmation","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"form","label":"Confirm CGPA, citizenship, Bumiputera status","required":true,"config":{"fields":["cgpa","citizenship","bumiputera_status"]}},{"ordinal":1,"type":"form","label":"Declare family income tier (B40 / M40 / T20)","required":true,"config":{"fields":["income_tier","monthly_income_rm"]}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":1,"label":"Income Tier Branch","node_type":"decision","assignee_role":"system","steps":[],"metadata":{"branches":[{"condition_key":"need_based_eligible","criteria":"Family income is B40 or lower-M40 (< RM 10,960/month) — eligible for need-based scholarships"},{"condition_key":"merit_only","criteria":"Family income is T20 (> RM 10,960/month) — route to corporate merit-based only"}]}},{"ordinal":2,"label":"Recommended Scholarships","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"form","label":"Review shortlist and pick scholarships to apply to","required":true,"config":{"options":["Yayasan UM","MARA (Bumiputera)","JPA Further Studies","MyBrainSc"]}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":3,"label":"Document Collection","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"upload","label":"Upload latest academic transcript","required":true,"config":{"accept":["application/pdf"]}},{"ordinal":1,"type":"upload","label":"Upload parents' income proof (EPF / payslip / Surat Pengesahan Pendapatan)","required":true,"config":{"accept":["application/pdf","image/*"]}},{"ordinal":2,"type":"form","label":"Write motivation letter (500-1000 words)","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":4,"label":"Submit Yayasan UM Application","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"student","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Confirm submission via UM HEPA portal","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":5,"label":"Faculty Endorsement","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"coordinator","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Faculty officer endorses the application","required":true,"config":{}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":6,"label":"Yayasan UM Committee Review (4-6 weeks)","node_type":"stage","assignee_role":"coordinator","steps":[{"ordinal":0,"type":"approval","label":"Yayasan UM committee decision","required":true,"config":{"sla_weeks":6}}],"metadata":{}},{"ordinal":7,"label":"Awarded","node_type":"end","assignee_role":null,"steps":[],"metadata":{"outcome":"completed"}},{"ordinal":8,"label":"Merit-only Corporate Path","node_type":"end","assignee_role":null,"steps":[],"metadata":{"outcome":"completed","note":"T20 students route directly to corporate scholarships (Khazanah, BNM, Petronas) — outside Yayasan UM pathway."}}],"edges":[{"source_ordinal":0,"target_ordinal":1,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":1,"target_ordinal":2,"condition_key":"need_based_eligible","label":"B40 / M40"},{"source_ordinal":1,"target_ordinal":8,"condition_key":"merit_only","label":"T20"},{"source_ordinal":2,"target_ordinal":3,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":3,"target_ordinal":4,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":4,"target_ordinal":5,"condition_key":null,"label":null},{"source_ordinal":5,"target_ordinal":6,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Endorsed"},{"source_ordinal":6,"target_ordinal":7,"condition_key":"approved","label":"Awarded"}],"deadlines":[{"stage_ordinal":6,"label":"Yayasan UM committee outcome window (4-6 weeks)","iso_date":null,"relative_days":42}],"reasoning":"Student is Malaysian, FSKTM Y3, CGPA 3.10, B40 tier — eligible for need-based scholarships. Plan prioritises Yayasan UM (UM-internal, fastest pathway, CGPA threshold 3.30 with hardship consideration). Income tier branch routes B40/M40 to need-based path; T20 students would route to corporate merit path. CGPA of 3.10 is below the standard 3.30 maintenance threshold, so the student should prepare a hardship justification in the motivation letter."}
